title: Google Chat integration
excerpt: Hi, it would be good to have a Google Chat integration with Monday.com similar to what you have with  Slack.  We get unlimited history of chat with Google Suite, whereas if we wanted to have all chat history in Slack, we…

posts.author: nick (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, it would be good to have a Google Chat integration with Monday.com similar to what you have with Slack. We get unlimited history of chat with Google Suite, whereas if we wanted to have all chat history in Slack, we’d need to upgrade to a paid plan.

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: HI @nick! Thanks so much for this suggestion - happy to pass this along to our team for consideration! Would there be any additional recipes outside of those you see in our current Slack integrations that might be useful for you and your team? Cheers!

posts.author: nick (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Not really in terms of Monday.com > Google Chat integration. The only comment I would make is that when I tested Slack, I got quite a lot of clutter around the update. It would be good if users could link to their Slack IDs so that the comments come through in Slack as from the person posting them instead of from monday.com.

If this is not possible, I would probably prefer something where the board and pulse are a bit clearer when the comment comes through, e.g.

Monday.com app

Hey, @soandoso, can you help me with such-and-such today?

Reply on Monday.com

Person: Nick G
Pulse: Complete Such-and-such
Board: Whatstheirname

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome - thanks @nick!

posts.author: mrjosephrivera (Joseph Rivera)
posts.cookedHtml: Voting this up…would be great to be able to add a Monday bot to our Chat rooms.

posts.author: Toploader (Jon Merchant)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be Epic for us. Just please don’t make it an enterprise only feature

posts.author: steve.escott (Steve Escott)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add Google Chat notification integration

posts.author: msmosso (Matheus Mósso)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 for Google Chat integration. It would be awesome to have it. Monday’s alternatives already have it.

posts.author: danidorado (Daniel Dorado)
posts.cookedHtml: Definitely we need to integrate workflows and google chat using bots!

posts.author: lindosl (Lindomário Sousa Lima)
posts.cookedHtml: Uow this would be awesome. Take my +1!

posts.author: 33Harlow (Kris Harlow)
posts.cookedHtml: Count me in on this - would like to see cleaner integration between Google Workspace and Monday as a whole!

posts.author: thebroggi (Random Name)
posts.cookedHtml: All other projectmanagement and ERP solutions like Trello, Assana, click-up, Jira, Meister Task, Sales Force, Tasklist and so on provide a Google Chat integration.

posts.author: robertogentile (Roberto Gentile - Inova e-Business)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also need this! +1
Urgent!

posts.author: jmtornetta (Jon Tornetta)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, this is really important for Monday.com. The vast majority of their user base likely uses Google Workplace.

Google Chat isn’t likely going anywhere. While Monday’s product team would likely find it ideal for their users to be using their native chat (for “stickiness”), there are far too many office chat tools out there already (Google, Teams, Slack, Asana, etc).

The best way Monday.com can differentiate their service is with easy integrations with what is already out there. Not rebuilding the wheel.

posts.author: nsimonton (Nick Simonton)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates on this?

posts.author: AndreaOEF (Andrea)
posts.cookedHtml: agreed with all the above - this would be huge for my team? any update on monday.com notifications appearing in google chat?

posts.author: pp_bm (Jose Beauregard)
posts.cookedHtml: Can somebody share any update of this? It would be extremely valuable for the team. The ticket has been open for more than a year, so at least share if this is going to happen at some time. Thanks!

posts.author: rafabsouza (Rafael Souza)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking forward this integration as well.

posts.author: pjewkes21 (Paul Jewkes)
posts.cookedHtml: Placing my vote here as well.

posts.author: RobertGF (robert anderson)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 From me aswell!
This is my only contention with monday.com.
I cannot communicate with my internal team outside of comments. If there needs to be a dialogue, i have to leave monday.com and go to google chat to have a convo.
There is an app that allows conversations, but its only specific to that board.

posts.author: Kiper (Müfit Kiper)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, this is becoming a dealbreaker for us. We are doing all heavy lifting in Google Workspace and really need better integration ASAP!

posts.author: lanceseabourn (Lance Seabourn)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here. We’ve been with monday for over a year now and unfortunately are switching to chat from slack and we’ll lose the notification and the bot. Might be worth it for us to switch to Asana or Trello for this reason alone

posts.author: greysenpaige (Greysen Paige)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also eching this, I would like to be able to leave Slack, but I’m stuck losing key parts of my process since Google Chat is missing.

posts.author: Sales816Solar (On'Rea Knox-Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to she this happen, our company is struggling now with the a solid internal communication for Teams. Not to mention one inclusive platform to communicate for internal teams and external entities.

posts.author: DougP (Doug Patterson)
posts.cookedHtml: Representing an organization that is looking for a solution, this may be a deal breaker for us. Can someone at Monday.com let us know if this is in the development pipeline?

posts.author: ronald (Ronald Ramsay)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates on whether or not this is in development? My business uses Google Workspace and could really benefit from this being added. Gmail and Google Calendar is already there… A great way for my team to communicate away from Slack would be great!

posts.author: elitanp (Elita Wong)
posts.cookedHtml: This request has been here since February 2020. A lot of companies use Google Suite, I’m not really sure why this hasn’t been integrated. I believe for those needing more security (healthcare, etc), that gchat is a better deal and similar to Slack.

posts.author: ezrata (Noah Ezra Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: @lauralev @Lisa-monday.com Please can you move this forward? This would be so helpful for so many people and would definitely make my work life easier! Google Chat is so widely used, this surely could be an easy integration. Please please help!

posts.author: everlawyer (Mischa Noll)
posts.cookedHtml: Our organization would also get a huge benefit if this was implemented. Any updates @lauralev @Lisa-monday.com ? Thanks so much.

posts.author: Kel (Kelly Cromwell)
posts.cookedHtml: So there is an “app” or “bot” that exists in Google Chat that can be added to spaces that claims to connect monday.com to Google Chat, but when I try to add it there, it won’t let me authorize it because it hasn’t been approved by monday.com. It would appear that not only have you not created this insanely useful and highly requested app, but you are actively blocking one that claims to do it? Can the dev team shed some light on this?

posts.author: tmorris301 (Tyson)
posts.cookedHtml: i’ve asked our CSR and they didn’t have any info. I’ve had to have my dev team use google dev to try to make one. very annoying. Even used zapier for a while. Any status on this would be great.

posts.author: Keem (Hakeem Baba)
posts.cookedHtml: This app https://monday.com/marketplace/10000131 in the monday app marketplace provides an integration with Google Chat

posts.author: Keem (Hakeem Baba)
posts.cookedHtml: It is now available in the app marketplace https://monday.com/marketplace/10000131

posts.author: kathrin (kathrin)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree! A Google Chat integration with Monday dot com would be super helpful, especially since Google Chat gives unlimited history without needing a paid plan like Slack. It’d be great if Monday dot com added this feature or a simple way to sync messages.
